past_papers.name: DBE NSC Past Examination Papers
past_papers.description: Official National Senior Certificate (Matric) past exam papers from 2008 to 2025. Includes November, May/June, and February/March supplementary papers across all subjects.

past_papers.name: IEB NSC Past Papers
past_papers.description: IEB NSC examination papers and marking guidelines for the previous 5 years. Papers from earlier years can be ordered via email.
past_papers.access: Free for recent 5 years; older papers available on request

past_papers.name: Studyclix South Africa
past_papers.description: Platform that takes past NSC exam papers across eight school subjects and breaks them down into topics and sub-topics with detailed teacher-created mark schemes, videos, and notes. Endorsed by the Department of Basic Education.

past_papers.name: SA Papers
past_papers.description: Collects free past exam papers for all Grades across Umalusi, IEB, and SACIA exam bodies. Available in multiple languages including Afrikaans, English, isiZulu, Sesotho, and isiXhosa.

past_papers.name: Teach Me 2 Matric Past Papers
past_papers.description: Compiled Matric NSC past papers from 2019 to 2024 in zip files or PDFs. All papers come from the Department of Basic Education.

past_papers.name: WCED Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: NSC past exam papers available through the WCED ePortal, including May/June and November sessions across all subjects.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Mathematics
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Mathematics past exam papers and memos from Testpapers. Covers Paper 1 (Algebra) and Paper 2 (Geometry) content.[reference:7]

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Mathematical Literacy
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Mathematical Literacy past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.[reference:8]

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Physical Sciences
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Physical Sciences past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Life Sciences
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Life Sciences past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Accounting
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Accounting past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Business Studies
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Business Studies past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Economics
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Economics past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Geography
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Geography past exam papers and memos from Testpapers. Available in English and Afrikaans.[reference:9]

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 History
past_papers.description: Grade 12 History past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 English HL & FAL
past_papers.description: Grade 12 English Home Language (HL) and First Additional Language (FAL) past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Afrikaans HT & EAT
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Afrikaans Huistaal (HT) and Eerste Addisionele Taal (EAT) past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.[reference:10]

past_papers.name: Testpapers - Grade 12 Technical Subjects
past_papers.description: Grade 12 Technical Subjects (Mechanical, Electrical, Civil Technology) past exam papers and memos from Testpapers.[reference:11]

past_papers.name: NWU Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Database of NWU exam papers from 2003 to present. Papers are organised by period: 2003-2008, 2009-2014, 2015-2020, and 2021 onward. No memorandums or multiple-choice questions included.

past_papers.name: UJ Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past examination papers for Science modules at the University of Johannesburg. Available only to signed-in users.

past_papers.name: UFH Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past examination papers from the Department of Mathematics at the University of Fort Hare, including topics in linear algebra, numerical methods, and mathematical modeling.

past_papers.name: SPU Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past examination papers at Sol Plaatje University to support student learning, revision, and exam preparation.

past_papers.name: CUT Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past exam papers available through the CUT Library website. Search by subject or module using course codes or keywords.

past_papers.name: UL Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past examination papers available through the University of Limpopo Library. Access via the Library menu under 'Prev. Question papers' or 'Exam Papers'.

past_papers.name: UWC Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past exam papers available through iKamva course modules. Papers from before 2022 are accessible via the library guide.
past_papers.access: Restricted (UWC login required for recent papers)

past_papers.name: UNISA Past Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Past exam questions and discussions from UNISA students. Community-driven resource with exam question comparisons from 2004 onwards.

past_papers.name: TVET Papers (tvetpapers.co.za)
past_papers.description: Comprehensive collection of TVET NATED exam papers from 2005 to present. Over 11,700+ NATED and 500 Installation Rules Papers available.

past_papers.name: MyNATED - TVET Exam Papers
past_papers.description: Mobile app serving TVET NATED exam papers from 2005 till now. Save papers offline for convenient study.

past_papers.name: TVET College Study Guides
past_papers.description: Study guides and past exam papers for NATED and NCV qualifications. Over 13,000+ NATED and 6,300+ NCV study materials available.

past_papers.name: TVET NCV Past Question Papers
past_papers.description: Mobile app with over 8,800+ NCV papers. Specifically designed for TVET students studying NCV qualifications from Level 2 to 4.

past_papers.name: TVET Exam Papers NATED and NCV
past_papers.description: Comprehensive collection of NATED and NCV exam papers from 2005 to 2026. Over 14,650+ NATED papers available.
